title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into Contract for the Service of Mr. Renz B. Tabadero, Web Developer for the Period 1 October 2021 to 31 March 2022 with Total Compensation in the Amount of One Hundred Forty Three Thousand Pesos (P 143,000.00) Chargeable Against Trust Fundand Ratifying the Same After. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MIKO C. PELEGRINA, 04/08/22)
